mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, enabled FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT role FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_id, password_hash, display_name, email, enabled, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{email}, 1, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT email FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND enabled = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role, granted_by, granted_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{role}, #{grantedBy}, #{grantedAt})
